name: Century Cobalt Corp.
summary: Century Cobalt Corp., an exploration stage company, engages in the acquisition, exploration, and development of mineral properties. The company explores for cobalt, gold, silver, lead, zinc, copper, and arsenic deposits. It holds interest in the Emperium Cobalt project in Idaho Cobalt Belt comprising 694 claims located to the southwest of Salmon, Idaho. The company was incorporated in 2008 and is headquartered in Los Angeles, California.
